_comment: Junk-test findings that predate the rules. These stay warnings under --junk-severity=error so existing debt does not block merges; anything not listed here is a new finding and fails. This file should only ever shrink.
findings: frontend/e2e/auth/auth-guest-redirect.spec.js::no_user_interaction::authenticated user navigating to sign_in is redirected away
